description_long: This is a simple, round bowl with a wide, open top and a gently curved, shallow body. The exterior and interior surfaces appear uniformly smooth and are finished in a deep, matte black color. The bowl has a faceted, polygonal geometry, giving it a modern, minimalist aesthetic. There are no visible handles, feet, or decorative elements on its surface. The rim is slightly beveled, and the base is flat, allowing it to rest stably on flat surfaces. Its size and shape suggest it is suitable for serving or holding small to medium quantities of food or other items.
description: A matte black, polygonal bowl with a wide opening and smooth, minimalist design. The surface is unadorned and modern.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, open top and the gently curved, faceted body of the bowl.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, highlighting the bowl's symmetrical, polygonal shape.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with no visible features or decorations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the uniform, faceted surface and wide opening.
